category_sources: source_facts.description says GLPK is a library for linear and mixed-integer programming; official GNU GLPK page describes solving LP, MIP, and related problems.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is glpk; official GNU page expands it as GLPK, GNU Linear Programming Kit.
docs_sources: Official GNU GLPK page has a Documentation section and states the reference manual and GNU MathProg documentation are included in the distribution.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Savannah GLPK project lists a CVS source repository, and FSF directory lists https://cvs.savannah.gnu.org/viewvc/glpk/ as the VCS repository webview.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies linear and mixed-integer programming; official GNU GLPK page describes LP, MIP, MathProg, callable library, and stand-alone solver components.
